economic_notes: GBEs include Odawa Stone Limited Partnership (stone quarry) and Odawa Freshwater Limited Partnership (25% interest in Odawa Island Farm LP). Business partnerships include UCCM Building Material Supply LP (14.28%), M'Nidoo M'Nising Power LP (16.665%, electrical power generation), and Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP (11.75%, accommodation/restaurant/catering). Odawa Stone reported a loss of $234,837 for the year on revenue of $276,776.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023), not 2024. The statement is consolidated and includes 4 GBEs (Odawa Stone LP, Odawa Stone GP, Odawa Freshwater LP, Odawa Freshwater GP) accounted for under modified equity method, plus 3 business partnerships (UCCMLP, MMPLP, GLHGLP) also under modified equity. Net debt position of $981,163 reported on statement of changes in net debt. Total government transfers calculated as Federal ($3,940,129) + Provincial ($778,005) = $4,718,134; OSR = $8,756,053 - $4,718,134 = $4,037,919 (includes Kinoomaadziwin education body funding $1,879,783, investment income, rental income, share of GBE loss, and other revenue). Schedule of remuneration for Chief & Council and senior officials not included in the provided text. Accounts receivable and current liabilities not explicitly stated in the provided text extract. MMPLP provision for impairment of $326,390 noted in partnership investments.
